label: enabled but missing lastPeriod returns null

phase.name: Menstrual
phase.training: Focus on light movement, yoga, walking. Energy is lowest — honor recovery.
phase.nutrition: Iron-rich foods, hydration. Cravings normal — don't restrict too hard.
phase.mood: Energy and mood lowest. Self-compassion > discipline.

phase.name: Follicular
phase.training: Peak performance window. Go heavy — PRs, high volume, HIIT. Estrogen rising = stronger recovery.
phase.nutrition: Higher carb tolerance. Fuel for performance.
phase.mood: Energy, confidence, motivation peak. Best window for hard sessions.

phase.name: Ovulatory
phase.training: Still strong but ligament laxity elevated. Maintain intensity, focus form.
phase.mood: Social energy and verbal fluency peak.

phase.name: Luteal
phase.training: Early: moderate intensity. Late (PMS): deload, reduce volume 20-30%.
phase.nutrition: BMR +100-300 cal/day. Increase healthy fats, complex carbs. Magnesium for cramps.
phase.supplements: Magnesium Glycinate, B6, Evening Primrose Oil, Calcium
phase.mood: Progesterone rises then drops. PMS days 24-28. Plan lighter workload.
